title: Sandwīp Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sandwīp with a Z-Score of +3.20. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures and humidity.
body:
The current heat wave in Sandwīp has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The high temperature and humidity, with an Umidita of 85%, are causing discomfort to the residents. 
 The wind speed of 9.5 km/h is not providing any relief, and the CDD of 10.2 GG is indicating a high energy demand.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on Sandwīp.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
